title: 7 Herbal Tinctures For Bronchitis
description: Thymus vulgaris tinctures contains thymol, a key bioactive constituent, which has antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Thymol helps to fight the underlying bacterial and viral infections that cause bronchitis, reducing the severity of the symptoms. Thymol's anti-inflammatory properties also help to reduce inflammation in the airways, making it easier to breathe.
